developments.t_zh: 推出 Reflect 使用仪表盘（beta）：追踪 AI 使用习惯、月度回顾与专注设置
developments.t_en: Launched Reflect, a beta dashboard tracking Claude usage habits with monthly recaps and focus settings

developments.t_zh: 宣布提高用量上限，并与 SpaceX 达成算力合作
developments.t_en: Announced higher usage limits for Claude alongside a compute deal with SpaceX

developments.t_zh: 美方解除对 Fable 5 / Mythos 5 的出口管制（6月底），政策摆动仍是变量
developments.t_en: US administration lifted export controls on Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5 in late June; policy swings remain a live variable

modelWatch.gap_note_zh: 闭源前沿仍领先，但出口政策反复给了中国开源窗口期；CNBC 报道智谱正借此收窄差距，代差护城河的政策敏感度上升
modelWatch.gap_note_en: Closed frontier still leads, but export-policy whiplash handed Chinese open-weight labs a window; the capability gap is increasingly policy-sensitive rather than purely technical

developments.t_zh: GPT-5.6 三型号（Sol/Terra/Luna）7月9日面向公众发布，经商务部 CAISI 附加测试后放行
developments.t_en: GPT-5.6 family (Sol/Terra/Luna) publicly released July 9 after additional Commerce/CAISI testing cleared wider rollout

developments.t_zh: 7月8日发布 GPT-Live 全双工语音模型，边听边说
developments.t_en: Launched GPT-Live on July 8, full-duplex voice models that listen and speak simultaneously

developments.t_zh: GPT-5.6 接入 Microsoft 365 Copilot 成为首选模型，并推出 ChatGPT Work
developments.t_en: GPT-5.6 became the preferred model in Microsoft 365 Copilot; ChatGPT Work launched for enterprise workflows

modelWatch.gap_note_zh: GPT-5.6 走「政府附加测试后放行」流程，闭源迭代节奏本身已被政策中介化；对巨头 capex 传导（微软链）依旧最直接
modelWatch.gap_note_en: GPT-5.6 shipped via a government-testing gate — closed-source cadence is now policy-mediated; capex transmission to the Microsoft chain remains the most direct channel

developments.t_zh: 发布 GLM-5.2 配套 agent/编码 harness，直接对标 Anthropic 的工具链
developments.t_en: Released a coding/agent harness for GLM-5.2, explicitly taking aim at Anthropic's tooling stack

developments.t_zh: GLM-5.2 权重以 MIT 协议开放：MoE 架构、1M 上下文，长程编码基准接近闭源前沿而成本约1/6
developments.t_en: GLM-5.2 weights open under MIT: MoE architecture, 1M context, near-frontier long-horizon coding benchmarks at roughly one-sixth the cost

developments.t_zh: CNBC：在美国厂商受政策掣肘期间，智谱正逼近美国顶级模型
developments.t_en: CNBC: Zhipu is closing in on top US models while American vendors are held back by policy constraints

modelWatch.gap_note_zh: 开源线首次「够用且便宜」到构成对闭源前沿的实质论证；若持续，应用层边际成本下降利好端侧/垂直软件的框架假设获得本周证据支持
modelWatch.gap_note_en: The open-weight line is now cheap-and-good-enough to be a real argument against the closed frontier — this week's evidence supports the app-layer-cost-collapse hypothesis

modelWatch.current_line: Qwen3.7 (Max flagship / Plus multimodal, proprietary API)

developments.t_zh: 盘前业绩更新：云收入同比+38%（AI 驱动），AI 产品三位数增长，本周股价大涨约11%
developments.t_en: Pre-earnings update showed cloud revenue up 38% on AI demand with triple-digit AI product growth; shares jumped ~11% this week

developments.t_zh: 新 AI/数据安全规则下，内部禁用 Anthropic 工具、收缩 Qwen 陪伴类产品，员工转用自研 Qoder
developments.t_en: Under new AI/data-security rules, Alibaba banned Anthropic tools in-house, trimmed Qwen companion products, and steered staff to its own Qoder assistant

developments.t_zh: Qwen3.7-Plus 上线百炼平台：视觉、深度推理、工具调用与自主迭代（6月初）
developments.t_en: Qwen3.7-Plus went live on Bailian in early June with vision, deep reasoning, tool invocation and autonomous iteration

modelWatch.gap_note_zh: API 独占的价值集中于云所有者假设本周被验证：Qwen3.7 独占 → 阿里云 AI 收入+38%；但监管收紧同时在修剪其产品面
modelWatch.gap_note_en: The proprietary-API-concentrates-value-at-the-cloud-owner hypothesis got direct confirmation: Qwen3.7 exclusivity → 38% cloud growth; regulation is simultaneously pruning the product surface

equities.correlation_note_zh: 美光成为 Anthropic 先进 AI 系统首选内存/存储供应商并共研 HBM，绑定深化
博通六大定制芯片客户含 Anthropic，其推理算力自研化直接受益博通
AWS 为 Anthropic 主要云与算力伙伴，Claude 迭代传导至其 capex 与云收入
谷歌为 Anthropic 股东兼云供应商，TPU 算力承接其训练需求
GPT-5.6 成为 M365 Copilot 首选模型，OpenAI 迭代最直接传导微软产品线
与 OpenAI 共研 Jalapeño 推理芯片，年底起部署整机架，定制 ASIC 主线
OpenAI 训练/推理算力主力供应商；其自研芯片进展亦构成边际分流风险
腾讯为智谱投资方，开源强发布利好其云与应用生态承接低成本模型
寒武纪：国产开源模型普及扩大本土推理算力需求的映射标的
科大讯飞：垂直闭源路线受开源边际成本下降挤压
Qwen3.7 API 独占直接沉淀为阿里云收入，本周盘前更新已验证
百度文心与 Qwen 在企业 API 市场正面竞争，Qwen 强势构成压力

weeklyTake.zh: 一周内 GPT-5.6 公发与 GLM-5.2 开源 harness 相继落地，开闭源代差进一步收窄且日益由政策而非纯技术决定。框架假设两头都拿到证据：闭源迭代→巨头链（AVGO 与苹果续约+OpenAI 芯片双催化大涨、MU 绑定 Anthropic）；API 独占→云所有者（阿里云 AI 收入+38%）。本周新变量是 SK 海力士以 265 亿美元创纪录规模登陆纳斯达克，把内存主线直接摆到美国投资者面前。
weeklyTake.en: GPT-5.6's public launch and Zhipu's GLM-5.2 harness landed within days — the open/closed gap keeps narrowing and is increasingly policy-set. Both transmission hypotheses got evidence: closed iterations moved the hyperscaler chain (AVGO's Apple+OpenAI double catalyst, MU's Anthropic tie-up), and API exclusivity showed up in Alibaba's 38% cloud growth. New variable: SK Hynix's record $26.5B Nasdaq debut puts the memory trade squarely in front of US investors.

tracks.state_zh: HBM 售罄至2027，HBM3E 报价上调约20%；HBM4 节奏分化：三星上量、海力士推迟至3Q26；SKHY 登陆纳斯达克
tracks.state_en: HBM sold out through 2027, HBM3E prices up ~20%; HBM4 ramps diverge (Samsung up, SK Hynix pushed to 3Q26); SKHY listed on Nasdaq

tracks.state_zh: CXL 池化仍处商业化早期，但互连层整体（CXL/NVLink Fusion/UALink）随 AI 集群扩张高速放量，ALAB 收入同比+93%
tracks.state_en: CXL pooling still early-commercial, but the interconnect layer (CXL/NVLink Fusion/UALink) is scaling fast with AI clusters; ALAB revenue +93% YoY

tracks.state_zh: 本周最强主线：NVIDIA ICMS/Rubin 官方化 KV-cache 下沉 NAND，NAND 合约价飙升，HBF 预计2H26送样
tracks.state_en: Strongest track this week: NVIDIA's ICMS/Rubin formalized KV-cache offload to NAND, NAND contract prices surging, HBF sampling expected 2H26

cards.moat_zh: 美国唯一 HBM 本土产能+政策红利；HBM 售罄至2027，16份不可撤销合同锁定超220亿美元 HBM 收入
cards.thesis_zh: FQ3 创纪录营收，宣布至2035年2500亿美元美国制造投入；成为 Anthropic 首选内存伙伴并共研 HBM/存储，T1 定价权与 T3 数据中心 NAND 双轮驱动
cards.key_risk_zh: HBM4 竞争中份额仍居第三；估值已计入超级周期，扩产潮或致2027后供给反转
cards.moat_en: Only US-based HBM maker with policy tailwind; HBM sold out through 2027 with $22B+ in non-cancelable contracts
cards.thesis_en: Record FQ3 revenue, $250B US manufacturing commitment through 2035, and first-choice memory partner to Anthropic co-developing HBM and storage — riding both T1 pricing power and T3 datacenter NAND
cards.key_risk_en: Still #3 in HBM4 share; supercycle priced in, capacity additions could flip supply after 2027

cards.moat_zh: HBM 市占约50-55%居首，为 NVIDIA HBM4 供应约三分之二；7月10日以265亿美元创外企纪录登陆纳斯达克
cards.thesis_zh: 上市募资投向新厂与设备，HBM4E 样品提前至6-7月送样；美股流动性改善后，T1 定价权最纯粹的载体
cards.key_risk_zh: HBM4 量产节奏推迟至3Q26，三星在 HBM4/4E 上抢跑；新股波动与解禁压力
cards.moat_en: HBM leader at ~50-55% share, supplying roughly two-thirds of NVIDIA's HBM4; listed on Nasdaq July 10 via a record $26.5B foreign ADS offering (ticker SKHY)
cards.thesis_en: IPO proceeds fund new fabs and equipment, HBM4E samples pulled forward to Jun-Jul; now the purest US-tradable vehicle for T1 pricing power with real liquidity
cards.key_risk_en: HBM4 volume ramp slipped to 3Q26 while Samsung accelerates; new-listing volatility and lockup overhang

catalysts.what: Symbol change to SKHY and regular-way Nasdaq trading

cards.moat_zh: 内存+代工+终端垂直一体，HBM 市占约35-40%；HBM4 销售额据报已破10亿美元，5月底率先向 NVIDIA 交付 HBM4E 样品
cards.thesis_zh: HBM4 世代三星节奏反超（全年出货量预期上调），若持续将改写 T1 双寡头格局；NAND 端同样受益 KV-cache 需求
cards.key_risk_zh: OTC ADR 流动性极差，美股敞口工具性弱；HBM 良率与客户认证仍是执行风险
cards.moat_en: Vertically integrated memory+foundry+devices; ~35-40% HBM share, HBM4 sales reportedly topped $1B and first HBM4E samples shipped to NVIDIA in late May
cards.thesis_en: Samsung is out-executing on the HBM4 generation with full-year volume estimates revised up — if sustained, it reshapes the T1 duopoly; NAND side also rides KV-cache demand
cards.key_risk_en: Very thin OTC ADR liquidity limits US-market expression; HBM yield and customer qualification remain execution risks

catalysts.what: HBM4E qualification and volume decisions at NVIDIA

cards.moat_zh: 智能互连平台横跨 CXL/PCIe/Ethernet/NVLink Fusion/UALink + COSMOS 软件栈，AI 集群扩张的连接层收税人
cards.thesis_zh: 收入同比+93%创纪录，7月初随板块反弹大涨；CXL 池化商业化的最直接上市标的，且不押注单一协议
cards.key_risk_zh: 估值极高；互连协议路线之争（NVLink 私有生态 vs 开放 CXL/UALink）可能重排份额
cards.moat_en: Intelligent connectivity platform spanning CXL, PCIe, Ethernet, NVLink Fusion and UALink plus the COSMOS software suite — a toll-taker on AI cluster scale-out
cards.thesis_en: Record results at +93% YoY revenue and a sharp early-July rebound; the most direct listed play on CXL pooling without single-protocol risk
cards.key_risk_en: Rich valuation; protocol wars (proprietary NVLink vs open CXL/UALink) could reshuffle share

cards.moat_zh: 定制 AI 硅+互连双线：获 NVIDIA 20亿美元投资并纳入 NVLink 生态，数据中心占收入76%
cards.thesis_zh: 50+定制 AI 设计机会、FY29 定制芯片收入目标超100亿美元；3nm XPU 今年量产，内存墙时代互连与近内存定制逻辑的关键卖铲人
cards.key_risk_zh: 7月初涨后显疲态；定制芯片项目集中度高，单客户流失冲击大
cards.moat_en: Dual custom-silicon + interconnect franchise: $2B NVIDIA investment with NVLink-ecosystem integration; datacenter now 76% of revenue
cards.thesis_en: 50+ custom AI design opportunities and $10B custom revenue targeted by FY29, lead 3nm XPU entering production this year — a key arms dealer for interconnect and near-memory custom logic
cards.key_risk_en: Post-rally exhaustion; custom-silicon concentration means single-customer losses hit hard

cards.moat_zh: 已更名 Everpure（2026-02-23 生效，NYSE 代码 PSTG 不变）：全闪存平台转向企业 AI 数据管理，并购 1touch，单季营收首破10亿美元
cards.thesis_zh: KV-cache 下沉与推理数据分层利好高性能全闪存阵列；更名标志从存储商转向 AI 数据基础设施定位
cards.key_risk_zh: 超大规模客户自建存储侵蚀高端需求；转型叙事需要收入结构证实
cards.moat_en: Renamed Everpure effective Feb 23, 2026 (NYSE ticker PSTG unchanged): all-flash platform pivoting to enterprise AI data management, 1touch acquisition, first $1B quarter
cards.thesis_en: KV-cache offload and inference data tiering favor high-performance all-flash arrays; the rebrand marks a strategic shift from storage vendor to AI data infrastructure
cards.key_risk_en: Hyperscaler in-house storage erodes the high end; the pivot narrative still needs revenue-mix proof

cards.moat_zh: NAND 纯度最高标的之一：营收同比+251%至60亿美元，毛利率78.4%；5份长约覆盖 FY27 约1/3产能，Stargate QLC SSD 商用
cards.thesis_zh: KV-cache 使 NAND 成为 AI 数据中心最大增量需求，2026年数据中心将成 NAND 第一大终端；HBF（高带宽闪存）2H26送样打开 T1 邻接空间
cards.key_risk_zh: 6月暴涨后深度回调，市场质疑高毛利在新产能投放下的持续性
cards.moat_en: One of the purest NAND plays: revenue +251% YoY to $6.0B at 78.4% gross margin; five LTAs covering ~1/3 of FY27 bits, Stargate QLC SSDs shipping
cards.thesis_en: KV-cache offload makes NAND the AI datacenter's biggest incremental demand — datacenters become NAND's #1 end market in 2026; HBF sampling in 2H26 opens an HBM-adjacent lane
cards.key_risk_en: Sharp post-rally selloff; market questions whether record margins survive new capacity additions

cards.moat_zh: 定制 ASIC + 交换/互连双垄断位：六大定制芯片客户（含 OpenAI/Anthropic/Meta/谷歌），下季 AI 收入指引约160亿美元（同比+200%+）
cards.thesis_zh: 本周双催化：与苹果续约至2031、与 OpenAI 共研推理芯片 Jalapeño 年底上架；内存池化所需的 PCIe/CXL 交换与光互连是其腹地
cards.key_risk_zh: AI 收入集中于少数超大客户；客户自研芯片能力内化是长期反噬风险
cards.moat_en: Dual lock on custom ASICs and switching/interconnect: six custom-chip customers including OpenAI, Anthropic, Meta and Google; ~$16B next-quarter AI revenue guide (+200% YoY)
cards.thesis_en: Double catalyst this week: Apple partnership extended through 2031 and the OpenAI co-developed Jalapeño inference chip racks deploying late this year; PCIe/CXL switching and optical interconnect for pooled memory is home turf
cards.key_risk_en: AI revenue concentrated in a handful of hyperscalers; customers internalizing design capability is the long-term counter-risk

cards.moat_zh: HBM 堆叠使 DRAM 测试强度倍增，测试机是 T1 扩产的隐性受益人；2026年内股价已翻倍有余
cards.thesis_zh: 美光创纪录季度后 HBM 测试订单预期升温（Cantor 目标价550）；7月2日单日-13.6%的板块恐慌显示高贝塔属性，论点未变但波动加剧
cards.key_risk_zh: 无业绩支撑的估值扩张；内存资本开支若因供给过剩担忧收缩，订单弹性反噬
cards.moat_en: HBM stacking multiplies DRAM test intensity — testers are the quiet beneficiary of every T1 capacity add; stock up ~140% in 2026
cards.thesis_en: Micron's record quarter stoked HBM test-order expectations (Cantor target $550); the July 2 single-day -13.6% sector panic shows the high-beta profile — thesis intact, volatility elevated
cards.key_risk_en: Valuation ran ahead of bookings; if memory capex flinches on oversupply fear, order elasticity cuts both ways

catalysts.what: Q2 2026 earnings — confirmation HBM orders are building in backlog

cards.moat_zh: 内存接口芯片+IP 授权双引擎；新发布 SOCAMM2 芯片组把 LPDDR5X 引入 AI 服务器内存模组，卡位低功耗高带宽新形态
cards.thesis_zh: DDR5 9600 RDIMM 与 LPDDR 服务器模组家族使其在 DRAM 代际升级和 CXL 控制器两条线均有敞口；本周波动大（7/7 -6.3%、7/8 +3.5%）
cards.key_risk_zh: 多家估值模型提示高估约30%；接口芯片竞争（澜起等）与授权收入周期性
cards.moat_en: Memory interface chips plus IP licensing; the new SOCAMM2 chipset brings LPDDR5X into AI-server memory modules, staking out the low-power high-bandwidth form factor
cards.thesis_en: DDR5 9600 RDIMM chipsets and the LPDDR server-module family give exposure to both DRAM generation upgrades and CXL controllers; choppy week (-6.3% Jul 7, +3.5% Jul 8)
cards.key_risk_en: Multiple valuation models flag ~30% overvaluation; interface-chip competition (Montage et al.) and licensing cyclicality

postMemory.take_zh: 内存墙叙事本周三线共振：T1 端 HBM 售罄+提价、SKHY 以创纪录 IPO 把主线搬进美股；T3 端 NVIDIA 官方化 KV-cache 下沉 NAND，成为增长最快主线；T2 互连层随集群扩张放量。但7月初板块单日两位数暴跌提醒：供给反转恐惧与高估值使该主题波动显著放大。首次建卡，全部标的以本周证据初始化。
postMemory.take_en: The memory-wall thesis fired on all three tracks this week: T1's sold-out HBM and price hikes plus SKHY's record IPO bringing the trade onshore; T3 becoming the fastest-moving track as NVIDIA formalized KV-cache-to-NAND; T2 interconnect scaling with clusters. Early-July's double-digit single-day drawdowns are the caveat — oversupply fear plus rich valuations mean elevated volatility. First full card build; all names initialized from this week's evidence.
